examples: Which is precisely what happens in the case of chronic myelogenous leukaemia.
At high power, the bone marrow of a patient with acute myelogenous leukemia is seen here.
Chronic lymphocytic leukemia and chronic myelogenous leukemia usually progress slowly compared to acute leukemias.
One of the most exciting is Glivec, STI-571, for chronic myelogenous leukemia (see box, page 34).
Cancer drug Gleevec gives chronic myelogenous leukemia patients a 24-month survival rate of 92%.
